name: Research Scout
tagline: Turns your meeting's open questions, competitors, and unverified claims into a sourced research briefing.
description: Every meeting leaves loose ends nobody has time to chase: open questions, competitors that got name-dropped, tools someone suggested evaluating, claims that went unchallenged. Research Scout mines the meeting for the highest-value research items, runs live web research on each one in parallel, and delivers a single briefing document — an executive summary, recommended next steps with suggested owners, and a sourced section per item with links you can click to verify. Install it and every research task that comes out of a meeting arrives pre-answered.
